title: Andrea Jones-Rooy, Asst. Prof. of Global China Studies

text:
Andrea Jones-Rooy, Asst. Prof. of Global China Studies
Twitter
Facebook
Weibo
April 28, 2015 - "Do the unpredictable and uncertain things because you don't know how things will go. College is a great time. It's not going to be this easy to study random stuff or travel somewhere. Now I have a job, and I can't travel all the time. It sucks. There is always the fear that you won't get a job, or you won't have anything tangible to show or say. But there is a chance that you make a discovery someone unexpected, and it may change your whole life around. There is always a reason you are interested in certain things. Maybe five or 10 years later, those things cross in some interesting ways." – Andrea Jones-Rooy, Asst. Prof. of Global China Studies (by Sunyi Wang)

text_blocks.text: Andrea Jones-Rooy, Asst. Prof. of Global China Studies

April 28, 2015 - "Do the unpredictable and uncertain things because you don't know how things will go. College is a great time. It's not going to be this easy to study random stuff or travel somewhere. Now I have a job, and I can't travel all the time. It sucks. There is always the fear that you won't get a job, or you won't have anything tangible to show or say. But there is a chance that you make a discovery someone unexpected, and it may change your whole life around. There is always a reason you are interested in certain things. Maybe five or 10 years later, those things cross in some interesting ways." – Andrea Jones-Rooy, Asst. Prof. of Global China Studies (by Sunyi Wang)
